name: 令牌亮出震懾全場
description: 男主在被嘲笑為流浪漢時亮出史塔克家族令牌，全場瞬間從嘲笑轉為恐懼。一個小物件改變整個場景氣氛的視覺衝擊力。
tags: 靜態物件引發的權力翻轉——所有人的表情從鄙視瞬間轉為驚恐

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: Do you think I'm a child trying to bribe me with candy? / This is Stark's feminist token. / What are you kidding me? She's nothing more than a delivery girl. Where'd you get that? / I gave it to her.
examples.context: 靜態物件引發的權力翻轉——所有人的表情從鄙視瞬間轉為驚恐
